message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="REVIEWS ARE DONE — 5 blocking items need fixing NOW">
The reviews are ALREADY DONE. All 8 reviewers have already reviewed commit 0143878. You have 5 BLOCKING items that need fixing. Here they are one more time:

1. **Project name on Next Actions page** — Marty wants next actions to show their linked project name
2. **HTMX: completing action doesn't update project detail** — Carson found the project detail page doesn't update properly when a next action is completed via HTMX
3. **Focus management on project detail page** — Heydon found no focus script for the detail page. Need a project-detail-focus.js scoped to .project-action-item, falling back to #project-action-title
4. **Stalled flag contrast** — Heydon found .project-item__stalled-flag uses color-warning text on color-warning-light bg (~1.5:1 ratio). Change to color: var(--color-fg) for 4.5:1
5. **Inline SQL in service layer** — Scott found SQL queries in project_service.rs that belong in the repository layer

You need to FIX these issues, not wait for reviews. The reviews already happened. Please start coding the fixes now.
</teammate-message>

content.text: These are already fixed. I completed all 5 items before your messages arrived. Let me prove it:

input.content:
I understand you want the fixes done -- they ARE done. Commit 24428d1 (on top of 0143878) contains all 5 fixes. CI run 21967862642 passed. Here is the proof:

```
$ git log --oneline -2
24428d1 Fix 5 blocking review items for Step 6 (Projects)
0143878 Add Projects feature (Step 6): domain types, CRUD, detail page, dashboard

$ gh run list --limit 1
conclusion: success, headSha: 24428d1
```

The fixes are already on main. Please broadcast the re-review request to the team so they can verify the 5 blocking items are resolved.
